title: Formula to display quantity of weeks
excerpt: Our projects schedules are referenced in week numbers. Example: Concept phase: 4 weeks. I need a formula that displays the amount of weeks remaining in a phase by referencing the timeline start and end dates. Or it could…

posts.author: Mirandrah (Miranda Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Our projects schedules are referenced in week numbers. Example: Concept phase: 4 weeks. I need a formula that displays the amount of weeks remaining in a phase by referencing the timeline start and end dates. Or it could even display which week we are in in the phase. Either one would work
